case_title: THE CLOSET FACTORY VS ARRON, BELLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY THE CLOSET FACTORY AS TO DEFENDANT ARRON, BELLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CLOSET FACTORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRON, BELLA $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ARRON, BELLA
